units.name: Bastion
units.prompt: Advance toward the nearest enemy. Use shield_wall facing the direction with the most enemies. If an enemy is adjacent, attack them.

units.name: Veil
units.prompt: Cloak and move behind enemy lines. Target isolated enemies with shadow_strike. Save breach for the most dangerous enemy. Avoid being caught uncloaked.

units.name: Weaver
units.prompt: Control chokepoints with traps. Place them between enemy positions and your allies. Use denial to block adjacent enemy abilities. Pulse groups when possible.

units.name: Aegis
units.prompt: Push forward aggressively. Shield_wall facing the enemy cluster. If flanked, turn to face the biggest threat. Attack when possible.

units.name: Bolt
units.prompt: Maintain distance. Use precision_shot on high-value targets — medics first, then damage dealers. Use suppressing_fire if enemies close in.

units.name: Shade
units.prompt: Stay cloaked and flank. Prioritize assassinating the enemy damage dealer. Use breach on sentinels to break their defensive posture. Recloak whenever it drops.

actions.thinking: Round 1, no enemies in range. Orders say cloak on first turn. Move north to advance toward enemy lines while cloaked.

Round 1 — cloak immediately per orders and tip. Move toward Weaver while cloaked to position for assassination next round. Weaver is 3 tiles away at (3,1). I'm at (3,4) facing S. Moving to (3,2) puts me 1 tile from Weaver and behind them (they face N, so south is behind). That's within my move range of 3.
Both enemies are out of range (dist 5 and 7). I need to close distance to get Weaver in range (need dist≤2). Moving to (5,2) gets me closer without overextending. No valid shots this turn.

Round 1, no enemies in range. Bolt is at (5,2) moving south, Aegis at (4,5). I should move toward the center and place a trap to control the approach path. Moving to (4,2) puts me closer to Bolt and lets me place a trap at (5,2) or (4,3) to intercept enemy movement. Actually, move to (4,1) first to get closer, then place trap at (4,2) or (5,2) to intercept Bolt's path.
No enemies adjacent, so advance toward nearest enemy Bolt at (5,2). Moving to (4,0) gets me closest within my 2-tile move range. Then use shield_wall facing E since enemies are to the east.
Enemies are at y=0 and y=1, I'm at y=5. Need to push forward. Move to (4,3) to close distance while staying in column with enemies. Shield_wall facing S toward the enemy cluster.

Cloak expires after this turn. Both enemies are out of range. Need to close distance toward Aegis at (4,3) — it's closer. Move as far east as possible while staying cloaked. Max move is 3 tiles. From (0,3), I can reach (3,3) which gets me closer to Aegis at (4,3). Next turn I can reach adjacent to Aegis for shadow_strike or breach.

Cloak has 1 turn remaining — I need to use it now before it drops. Veil (enemy specter) is the priority damage dealer at dist=1, facing E. I can move to (2,3) to get behind Veil, then breach them to take control next turn. This keeps me cloaked during the move and uses breach before cloak drops. Weaver is 2 tiles away so I must not go adjacent to them — (2,3) keeps me at safe distance.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward the back line, exposing yourself

actions.thinking: Weaver(vector) is at (4,1), distance 2 — within precision_shot range and not adjacent so no blocking. Priority targets: no medics visible, so target damage dealers. Veil(specter) is high mobility threat at (3,3). Weaver(vector) is closest and dangerous. I'm at (5,2), not adjacent to Weaver so precision_shot is available. I haven't moved so full 2dmg applies. Target Weaver at (4,1) — closest threat and within range 2. Stay at current position to maintain distance from Weaver (moving closer risks adjacency).

Aegis is 2 tiles north at (4,3). There's already a trap at (4,2) between me and Aegis — good chokepoint. I should move to (5,2) to get adjacent to the trap tile and closer to Bolt, while my denial aura will pressure any enemies who approach. Then I can use pulse if Aegis steps into the trap and gets pushed toward me, or attack Aegis from (5,2) which would be adjacent at distance... actually (5,2) to (4,3) is dist 2, not adjacent. Let me reconsider. Move to (4,2) is blocked by trap. Move to (5,1) keeps pressure. From (5,1), Aegis at (4,3) is still dist ~2. Better: move to (5,2), then pulse — Aegis is at (4,3), distance from (5,2) is sqrt(1+1)=~1.4, within 1-tile AoE? No, pulse hits within 1 tile (adjacent only). From (5,2), Aegis at (4,3) is distance 2 — not in pulse range. Attack requires adjacent. I can't reach Aegis directly. Best play: move to (3,2) to place a trap at (3,3) to block Shade's path, or move toward the action. Actually, move to (5,2) and place trap at (5,3) to threaten Bolt's position.

Nearest enemy is Aegis at (4,3), dist=3. Move toward it: (4,1) gets me closer. Note trap at (4,2) - avoid it. Moving to (4,1) puts me dist=2 from Aegis. Enemies are mostly to the N, use shield_wall facing N to protect against Aegis and others.

Veil is adjacent at (3,3). Orders say attack when possible and push aggressively. I can attack Veil now, then stay fortified (don't move) to keep 50% DR. Shield_wall facing enemy cluster (S/W direction) isn't as useful as attacking. Attack Veil first, then shield_wall facing W to protect against Bastion and Weaver cluster.

Orders say move away from allies and toward back line. I'm at (3,3) with 2HP. Aegis is at (4,3) facing S — I can move to (4,4) to get behind them, then breach. That moves me toward the enemy back line and away from allies at (4,1) and (5,2). Breach from behind Aegis would be powerful — sentinel obeying me next turn. Let me move to (4,4) first, then breach Aegis from behind.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from the front line toward your own back line.

Weaver at (5,2) is adjacent, blocking my abilities via denial zone. I need to move away first to escape denial, then use precision_shot on Veil who is wounded. No enemies adjacent, so no attack. Orders say advance toward nearest enemy. Shade and Bolt are both at dist 4, roughly north. Moving to (4,3) advances me north while avoiding the trap at (4,2).
